create_file.description: 创建或写入文件，支持追加模式、自动创建父目录
create_file.author: Lingxi Team

config.name: create_file
config.description: 创建或写入文件，支持追加模式、自动创建父目录
config.trigger_conditions: 用户请求创建文件、写入文件内容、追加内容到文件时触发
config.execution_guidelines:
1. 验证 file_path 参数是否为绝对路径
2. 自动创建父目录
3. 支持写入和追加两种模式
4. 使用 UTF-8 编码
config.author: Lingxi Team

delete_file.description: Delete a file. Use this skill when the user needs to remove or delete a file from the filesystem.
delete_file.author: Lingxi Team

config.name: delete_file
config.description: Delete a file. Use this skill when the user needs to remove or delete a file from the filesystem.
config.trigger_conditions: 用户请求删除文件、移除文件时触发
config.execution_guidelines:
1. 验证file_path参数是否为绝对路径
2. 检查文件是否存在
3. 执行删除操作
4. 返回删除结果
config.author: Lingxi Team

execute_command.description: Execute Linux Shell or PowerShell commands. Use this skill when the user needs to run terminal commands, execute scripts, or perform system operations.
execute_command.author: Lingxi Team

config.name: execute_command
config.description: Execute Linux Shell or PowerShell commands. Use this skill when the user needs to run terminal commands, execute scripts, or perform system operations.
config.trigger_conditions: 用户请求执行命令、运行脚本、执行系统操作时触发
config.execution_guidelines:
1. 自动检测操作系统并选择合适的shell
2. Windows使用PowerShell，Linux/Mac使用Bash
3. 支持指定工作目录
4. 设置30秒超时
5. 返回命令输出或错误信息
config.author: Lingxi Team

fetch_webpage.description: Fetch webpage content and optionally save to a local file. Use this skill when the user needs to retrieve web content, download web pages, or save web content to a file.
fetch_webpage.author: Lingxi Team

config.name: fetch_webpage
config.description: Fetch webpage content and optionally save to a local file. Use this skill when the user needs to retrieve web content, download web pages, or save web content to a file.
config.trigger_conditions: 用户请求获取网页内容、下载网页、保存网页到文件时触发
config.execution_guidelines:
1. 验证url参数
2. 使用requests库获取网页内容
3. 使用html2text将HTML转换为Markdown
4. 如果提供save_path，保存到文件
5. 返回网页内容或保存结果
config.author: Lingxi Team

modify_file.description: Modify file content by replacing old content with new content. Use this skill when the user needs to update, edit, or replace content in an existing file.
modify_file.author: Lingxi Team

config.name: modify_file
config.description: Modify file content by replacing old content with new content. Use this skill when the user needs to update, edit, or replace content in an existing file.
config.trigger_conditions: 用户请求修改文件、更新文件内容、替换文件中的文本时触发
config.execution_guidelines:
1. 验证file_path参数是否为绝对路径
2. 验证old_content和new_content参数
3. 检查文件是否存在
4. 替换所有匹配的文本
5. 返回替换次数
config.author: Lingxi Team

read_file.description: 读取文件内容，支持搜索、流式读取、编码自动检测
read_file.author: Lingxi Team

config.name: read_file
config.description: 读取文件内容，支持搜索、流式读取、编码自动检测
config.trigger_conditions: 用户请求读取文件、查看文件内容、搜索文件中的文本时触发
config.execution_guidelines:
1. 验证 file_path 参数是否为绝对路径
2. 大文件自动使用流式读取
3. 自动检测文件编码
4. 搜索时显示上下文
config.author: Lingxi Team

search.description: Search for information on the internet. Use this skill when the user asks to search for information, look up facts, find resources, or research topics online.
search.author: Lingxi Team

config.name: search
config.description: Search for information on the internet. Use this skill when the user asks to search for information, look up facts, find resources, or research topics online.
config.trigger_conditions: 用户请求搜索信息、查找事实、研究主题、查询网络时触发
config.execution_guidelines:
1. 验证query参数
2. 支持多站点搜索（CSDN、百度百科、腾讯新闻）
3. 可指定搜索站点和结果数量
4. 返回格式化的搜索结果
config.author: Lingxi Team

docx.description: Comprehensive document creation, editing, and analysis with support for tracked changes, comments, formatting preservation, and text extraction. When Claude needs to work with professional documents (.docx files) for: (1) Creating new documents, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with tracked changes, (4) Adding comments, or any other document tasks
docx.author: Anthropic

config.name: docx
config.description: Comprehensive document creation, editing, and analysis with support for tracked changes, comments, formatting preservation, and text extraction. When Claude needs to work with professional documents (.docx files) for: (1) Creating new documents, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with tracked changes, (4) Adding comments, or any other document tasks
config.trigger_conditions: 用户请求创建Word文档、编辑Word文档、处理修订、添加注释时触发
config.execution_guidelines:
1. 返回docx技能的完整使用说明
2. 提供解包、打包、验证等工具脚本
3. 支持修订和注释处理
4. 保留格式和文本结构
config.author: Anthropic

pdf.description: Comprehensive PDF manipulation toolkit for extracting text and tables, creating new PDFs, merging/splitting documents, and handling forms. When Claude needs to fill in a PDF form or programmatically process, generate, or analyze PDF documents at scale.
pdf.author: Anthropic

config.name: pdf
config.description: Comprehensive PDF manipulation toolkit for extracting text and tables, creating new PDFs, merging/splitting documents, and handling forms. When Claude needs to fill in a PDF form or programmatically process, generate, or analyze PDF documents at scale.
config.trigger_conditions: 用户请求填写PDF表单、批量处理PDF、生成PDF、合并拆分PDF时触发
config.execution_guidelines:
1. 返回pdf技能的完整使用说明
2. 提供PDF转图像、提取表单字段、填写表单等工具
3. 支持批量PDF操作
4. 提供边界框检查工具
config.author: Anthropic

xlsx.description: Comprehensive spreadsheet operations including read, analyze, merge, create, edit, and sort. Supports Excel files (.xlsx, .xlsm) and CSV files (.csv, .tsv).
xlsx.author: Lingxi Team

config.name: xlsx
config.description: Comprehensive spreadsheet operations including read, analyze, merge, create, edit, and sort. Supports Excel files (.xlsx, .xlsm) and CSV files (.csv, .tsv).
config.trigger_conditions: 用户请求读取Excel文件、分析数据、合并表格、创建新表格、编辑表格或排序表格时触发
config.execution_guidelines: 1. 根据operation参数执行相应操作\n2. 返回操作结果或错误信息\n3. 支持多种Excel操作：读取、分析、合并、创建、编辑、排序
config.author: Lingxi Team

extract_news.description: Extract news content from webpage using trafilatura. Use this skill when user needs to extract main content from news articles, blog posts, or web pages.
extract_news.author: Lingxi Team

config.name: extract_news
config.description: Extract news content from webpage using trafilatura. Use this skill when user needs to extract main content from news articles, blog posts, or web pages.
config.trigger_conditions: 用户请求从网页提取新闻内容、文章正文、去除广告和导航栏时触发
config.execution_guidelines:
1. 验证url参数
2. 使用trafilatura提取网页主要内容
3. 支持提取标题、正文、作者、发布日期等
4. 如果提供save_path，保存到文件
5. 返回提取的新闻内容
config.author: Lingxi Team

skill-creator.description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

config.name: skill-creator
config.description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

financial_news.description: Get latest financial news headlines from CaiLian She (财联社). Use this skill when user asks for financial news, stock market news, or economic headlines.
financial_news.author: Lingxi Team

config.name: financial_news
config.description: Get latest financial news headlines from CaiLian She (财联社). Use this skill when user asks for financial news, stock market news, or economic headlines.
config.trigger_conditions: 用户请求获取财经新闻、股市新闻、经济头条时触发
config.execution_guidelines:
1. 验证参数
2. 优先使用Selenium获取新闻（支持动态内容）
3. 如果Selenium失败，回退到requests方法
4. 过滤最近24小时的新闻
5. 返回格式化的新闻列表
config.author: Lingxi Team

apply_patch.description: 应用统一 diff 格式补丁到文件，支持预览和备份
apply_patch.author: Lingxi Team

config.name: apply_patch
config.description: 应用统一 diff 格式补丁到文件，支持预览和备份
config.trigger_conditions: 用户请求应用补丁、应用 diff、代码重构时触发
config.execution_guidelines: 1. 验证 patch_text 格式\n2. 默认创建备份\n3. 支持 dry_run 预览
config.author: Lingxi Team

batch_read.description: 批量读取多个文件，支持通配符匹配和大小限制
batch_read.author: Lingxi Team

config.name: batch_read
config.description: 批量读取多个文件，支持通配符匹配和大小限制
config.trigger_conditions: 用户请求读取多个文件、查看项目结构、批量分析代码时触发
config.execution_guidelines: 1. 验证文件路径\n2. 限制文件大小\n3. 限制文件数量
config.author: Lingxi Team
